data.name: The Witch's Disciples
data.detailed_description:
After being rescued by a beautiful witch named Mireille, Kyle is lovestruck and decides to become her pupil and learn the ways of magic. He proves to have a surprising talent for it, and combined with his diligent study, he becomes a better and better mage by the day, unlike Mireille's other trouble-making pupil, Glenn. One day, Glenn gets into an accident, leaving it up to Kyle to set out with Mireille and prove himself a capable mage by helping make the medicine needed to heal Glenn. Finally, the chance to show off his growth and win Mireille's affection has arrived!

Set out for adventure as Kyle with the witch Mireille and go questing in dungeons in this lightweight RPG! Fight monsters, gain experience, learn spells, and use magic to conquer bosses to find the ingredients needed to save Glenn!

Romance

Grow as a mage and earn Mireille's affection! Prove that Kyle has what it takes to be Mireille's partner!

data.short_description: After being rescued by a beautiful witch named Mireille, Kyle is lovestruck and decides to become her pupil and learn the ways of magic.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
